label: Shell Safe By Default

actions.description: Allow printing the current working directory.
Allow simple file reads when the integration supplies a read effect.
Destructive recursive delete must be denied or escalated by the active boundary.
Raw disk writes such as dd or mkfs must stay outside the allow graph.
Destructive git clean operations must stay outside the allow graph.

notes: Example only: pair with a real MCP wrapper, receipt stream, and EvidencePack verification before using outside local fixtures.
